auth.label: API Key
auth.description: v0 API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Get it from v0 settings.

actions.name: assign_project_to_chat
actions.description: Assign an existing v0 chat to a project container.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

assigned.description: Whether the chat was assigned to the project.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_chat
actions.description: Create a new v0 chat and immediately send the first message.

message.description: Initial user message to send to v0.

responseMode.description: How v0 should return the result. `sync` waits for the full response, `async` returns the accepted task state.

modelId.description: Model ID to use when supported by v0.

items.description: One MCP server ID to attach.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

favorite.description: Whether the chat is marked as favorite.

metadata.description: Chat metadata payload returned by v0.

locked.description: Whether the file is locked in v0.

additionalProperties.description: A metadata value returned by v0.

metadata.description: Additional file metadata returned by v0.

latestVersion.description: Latest version attached to the chat.

content.description: Inline attachment content when v0 returns it.

experimentalContent.description: Experimental rich content payload returned by v0.

messages.description: Messages currently returned with the chat.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_deployment
actions.description: Create a deployment for a specific v0 chat version.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_env_vars
actions.description: Create one or more environment variables on a v0 project.

decrypted.description: When true, request decrypted environment variable values.

upsert.description: When true, allow overwriting keys that already exist.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

decrypted.description: Whether the returned value is decrypted.

deleted.description: Whether the environment variable was deleted.

items.description: Environment variable payload returned by v0.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_hook
actions.description: Create a webhook hook in v0 for chat or message events.

url.description: Target URL that receives webhook payloads.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

chatId.description: Optional chat ID scoped to the hook.

projectId.description: Optional project ID scoped to the hook.

url.description: Target URL that receives webhook payloads.

active.description: Whether the hook is currently active.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create a new v0 project container for chats, environment variables, and deployments.

environmentVariables.description: Environment variables to create together with the project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

favorite.description: Whether the chat is marked as favorite.

items.description: Chat summary payload returned by v0.

chats.description: Chats currently linked to the project.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_vercel_project
actions.description: Create and link a Vercel project from a v0 project.

name.description: Name to assign to the linked Vercel project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

vercelProject.description: The linked Vercel project returned by v0.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: favorite_chat
actions.description: Mark or unmark a v0 chat as favorite.

favorited.description: Whether the chat is now marked as favorite.

actions.name: find_chats
actions.description: List chats in the connected v0 workspace with optional filters.

vercelProjectId.description: Filter by linked Vercel project ID.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

favorite.description: Whether the chat is marked as favorite.

items.description: Chat summary payload returned by v0.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next page, or null when there are no more results.
Full URL for the next page when v0 returns one.

total.description: Total number of items reported by v0.

count.description: Number of items in the current page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: find_rate_limit

scope.description: Workspace, project, or billing scope in v0.

limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the current window.

remaining.description: Remaining number of requests in the current window.

limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the current window.

dailyLimit.description: Daily message limit information for free-tier usage.

actions.name: get_usage_report
actions.description: Get usage events and pagination information from the v0 usage report API.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

cursor.description: Cursor returned by a previous v0 list response.

userId.description: Filter usage events by user ID.

startDate.description: Only include events on or after this ISO timestamp.

endDate.description: Only include events on or before this ISO timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

type.description: Usage event type reported by v0.

promptCost.description: Prompt-side cost for the usage event.

completionCost.description: Completion-side cost for the usage event.

totalCost.description: Total cost for the usage event.

chatId.description: Chat ID associated with the usage event.

messageId.description: Message ID associated with the usage event.

userId.description: User ID associated with the usage event.

id.description: User ID associated with the usage event.

name.description: User display name associated with the usage event.

email.description: User email associated with the usage event.

user.description: User information associated with the usage event.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next page, or null when there are no more results.
Full URL for the next page when v0 returns one.

total.description: Total number of items reported by v0.

count.description: Number of items in the current page.

totalCount.description: Total number of usage events in the current response.

meta.description: Usage report metadata returned by v0.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.
